pageContext.name: Ghost Soldier (Green)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the iconic Ghost Soldier (Green) Sixth Scale Figure!  The Ghost Soldier (Green) comes equipped with a stunning set of green armor along with her spear and shield. With a seamless and posable body in highly detailed 1:6 scale form, she is ready to lead her troops into battle!  Add the Ghost Soldier (Green) Sixth Scale Figure to your collection today!
